xsl:when.test: string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '4494' or $cat_id = '5969' or $cat_id = '5970' or $cat_id = '5976' or $cat_id = '5977' or $cat_id = '5980' or $cat_id = '5984' or $cat_id = '5985' or $cat_id = '5987' or $cat_id = '5989' or $cat_id = '5990' or $cat_id = '5991' or $cat_id = '5997' or $cat_id = '5999' or $cat_id = '6000' or $cat_id = '6004' or $cat_id = '6005' or $cat_id = '6006' or $cat_id = '6007' or $cat_id = '6008' or $cat_id = '6009' or $cat_id = '6011'
